## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<description>` (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#making-changes))
- [ ] Tests added/updated (in `packages/test-shared` if the behavior applies to every plugin)
- [ ] `vp run ready` passes locally
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) - it becomes the squash-merge commit message
